_readme: Expected-output model for out/decision_sentences.csv (step 4, AGGREGATE) — un-collapsed detail behind threads_master.csv's decision_tone_mean: one row per first-person past-decision sentence found in a tier-1 thread (pipeline/step3d_sentiment.py), with its own VADER tone and build/buy stance tag. Tidy/long format for direct use in a box plot grouping tone by stance. Can legitimately be empty (min_rows 0) in a small pilot run with no qualifying sentences.
